prompt: Create a realistic vertical smartphone photo taken inside a modern sports arena concourse at night, with glossy polished gray floors reflecting blue and purple lights, queue stanchions, concession signage, and distant entrance signs in the background, including a large red “STAPLES” wall graphic on the left and a blue “crypto.com” sign on the right. In the foreground, show a young woman standing close to the camera, framed from upper thighs to head, wearing a black satin slip dress with thin straps, with shoulder-length wavy dark hair and a black shoulder bag strap. Her face is fully obscured by a centered solid brown square privacy block. She holds exactly two food-and-drink items: in her left hand, one large clear plastic cup of dark red frozen drink with a domed lid and one black straw; in her right arm, one white cardboard tray containing exactly four visible snack components: a huge white bucket overflowing with yellow-and-white buttered popcorn, a pile of nacho chips covered in bright orange cheese sauce, one small clear cup of sliced jalapeños, and one small clear cup of red salsa. Use candid wide-angle perspective, slightly overhead camera angle, sharp foreground detail, natural indoor arena lighting, realistic colors, casual social-media snapshot aesthetic, no extra people in the foreground, no readable added text beyond the venue signs.
